notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Yoshinobu Yamamoto. Isaac Paredes scores. Jose Altuve to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Freddie Freeman singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Brice Matthews, deflected by right fielder Cam Smith. Hyeseong Kim scores. Shohei Ohtani scores. Freddie Freeman to 2nd. Fielding error by right fielder Cam Smith.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Freddie Freeman singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Brice Matthews, deflected by right fielder Cam Smith. Hyeseong Kim scores. Shohei Ohtani scores. Freddie Freeman to 2nd. Fielding error by right fielder Cam Smith.

notableEvents.label: Isaac Paredes GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Paredes grounds into a double play, third baseman Max Muncy to second baseman Alex Freeland to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Yordan Alvarez out at 2nd. Isaac Paredes out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Freddie Freeman singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Brice Matthews, deflected by right fielder Cam Smith. Hyeseong Kim scores. Shohei Ohtani scores. Freddie Freeman to 2nd. Fielding error by right fielder Cam Smith.
